Run 15,000+ Models Instantly

Inference Providers let you run inference on thousands of models served by our partners using a simple, unified, OpenAI-compatible serverless API.

Hugging Face Inference Partners

  • Groq
  • Novita
  • Cerebras
  • SambaNova
  • Nscale
  • fal
  • Hyperbolic
  • Together AI
  • Fireworks
  • Featherless AI
  • Zai
  • Replicate
  • Cohere
  • Scaleway
  • Public AI
  • OVHcloud AI Endpoints
  • DeepInfra
  • WaveSpeed
  • HF Inference API
Get Started
